summary: Iteration 239 - Phonic Resonance API & Crossbar Position Fix Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. Bug fix confirmed: SovereignCrossbar moved from top-0 to top-12 (48px), no longer overlapping Navigation. All 4 phonic API endpoints working correctly. Frontend hooks (usePhonicResonance, useProximityHarmonics, usePredictiveSonicTug) properly implemented and wired.

issues: Trial modal appears on login - expected behavior for test user with concluded trial

critical_code_review_comments: SovereignCrossbar.js line 295: Changed from 'fixed top-0' to 'fixed top-12' - bug fix confirmed
SuanpanPhysics.js line 33: VACUUM_CATCH_Y changed from 65 to 115 for crossbar offset
phonic.py: POST /api/phonic/record-movement correctly records route visits with frequency mapping
phonic.py: POST /api/phonic/generate-flourish returns sonic_profile with base_frequency, pattern, tempo, overtones
phonic.py: GET /api/phonic/harmonic-pairs returns 6 pairs with freq_a, freq_b, interval, ratio
phonic.py: GET /api/phonic/movement-summary returns aggregated movement data
usePhonicResonance.js exports ROUTE_FREQUENCIES mapping (432Hz Spotless, 528Hz Enlightenment, 741Hz Tech/Dev, 396Hz Meditation, 852Hz Star Charts, 639Hz Wellness, 963Hz Creative)
usePhonicResonance.js exports useProximityHarmonics with startResonance and stopResonance
usePhonicResonance.js exports usePredictiveSonicTug with engage and disengage
NebulaPlayground.js imports and uses useProximityHarmonics for resonance detection (lines 6, 112, 165, 173)
ESLint warnings present but non-blocking: missing dependencies in useEffect/useCallback hooks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 239 verified: (1) Bug fix: SovereignCrossbar moved from top-0 to top-12 (48px below nav), confirmed via Playwright (crossbar.y=48px, nav.y=0px). (2) Backend phonic API: 4 new endpoints - POST /api/phonic/record-movement (records route visits with Solfeggio frequency mapping), POST /api/phonic/generate-flourish (returns sonic_profile with Gemini fallback to algorithmic), GET /api/phonic/harmonic-pairs (6 pairs for proximity phase-locking), GET /api/phonic/movement-summary (aggregated history). (3) Frontend hooks: usePhonicResonance (route-based Web Audio), useProximityHarmonics (startResonance/stopResonance for compatible spheres), usePredictiveSonicTug (engage/disengage for gravity well approach). (4) NebulaPlayground wires useProximityHarmonics into resonance detection loop. (5) OrbitalNavigation renders PhonicResonanceProvider when token exists. (6) VACUUM_CATCH_Y changed from 65 to 115 to account for crossbar offset. Test user grad_test_522@test.com has concluded trial.

backend_record_movement.details: POST /api/phonic/record-movement returns {success: true, frequency, route_key} with correct Solfeggio mapping (meditation=396Hz, suanpan=741Hz, star-chart=852Hz)

backend_generate_flourish.details: POST /api/phonic/generate-flourish returns sonic_profile with base_frequency, pattern (steady/ascending/descending/arpeggio/ambient/pulsing), tempo, overtones, source (time_default/algorithmic/gemini)

backend_harmonic_pairs.details: GET /api/phonic/harmonic-pairs returns 6 pairs with freq_a, freq_b, interval, ratio, binaural_base=7

backend_movement_summary.details: GET /api/phonic/movement-summary returns total_sessions, dominant_frequency, routes_visited, total_duration_ms

frontend_crossbar_position_fix.details: SovereignCrossbar positioned at top=48px (top-12), Navigation at top=0px - no overlap confirmed

frontend_navigation_visible.details: Navigation bar visible and accessible above crossbar

frontend_smartdock_buttons.details: SmartDock at bottom-left with 9 clickable buttons

frontend_crossbar_modules.details: 5 crossbar module icons visible and draggable (mixer, trade, starchart, meditation, wellness)

frontend_use_phonic_resonance_hook.details: usePhonicResonance hook exists with ROUTE_FREQUENCIES mapping

frontend_use_proximity_harmonics_hook.details: useProximityHarmonics hook exports startResonance and stopResonance

frontend_use_predictive_sonic_tug_hook.details: usePredictiveSonicTug hook exports engage and disengage

frontend_nebula_playground_wiring.details: NebulaPlayground imports and uses useProximityHarmonics for resonance detection

frontend_app_compiles.details: App compiles without errors, only ESLint warnings
